The '''''Third Anthology''''' set was the third anthology collection of the popular [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game]] (SWCCG). It was released [[June 14]]th, [[2000]]. Each set contained two booster packs of [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] expansion, two booster packs of Unlimited Premiere, one [[Light side of the Force/Legends|Light Side]] Special Edition Starter Deck, one [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]] Special Edition Starter Deck, and the following six exclusive Premium cards:
*A New Secret Base
*[[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo-Detoo]] In [[Red Five|Red 5]]
*[[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] Garrison
*Prisoner 2187
*[[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] Base Operations/One In A Million
*Set Your Course For The [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] System/The Ultimate Power In The [[Universe/Legends|Universe]]

The contents, along with a checklist of all ''Star Wars'' CCG cards published to date and a Glossary/Special Edition Rulebook, came in a long, 800+ count black box with an image of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] and the ''[[Star Wars]]'' CCG logo on it.
